top_signals.title: Brent oil price posts biggest monthly loss in six years as market counts on a U.S.-Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump said he would meet in the White House Situation Room to make a final decision about a deal with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum’s US comeback hinges on power, not tariffs, industry advocates say
top_signals.summary: Century Aluminum’s proposed smelter in Oklahoma remains dependent on securing a long-term electricity agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Space rally gets reality check with Blue Origin blowup
top_signals.summary: The Jeff Bezos-backed firm's New Glenn rocket blew up Thursday evening while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad.

top_signals.title: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets as multibillion-dollar sector draws institutional liquidity providers.
